adamw_followup.non_goals: No weak Bellman/proximal anchor, no action/gain matching to the known controller, no coverage perturbations, no robust rollout, and no GRU training in this materialization.

rerun_metadata.lane_description: Deterministic analytical lane: exact recursions and deterministic rollouts/audits with no sampled sensory, motor/process, or signal-dependent control noise.
rerun_metadata.phase_label_policy: Phase 1 and Phase 3 reruns must report both discretization and lane. Euler deterministic analytical results are canonical after the Euler card lands; ZOH results remain sensitivity/historical unless explicitly promoted.

adamw_followup.scope: Clean output-feedback LQR rollout recovery: clean, stronger optimizer, whitening/scaling, and stronger optimizer plus whitening/scaling are objective-preserving; block/time preconditioning is objective-preserving and unscaled before reporting; Bellman-auxiliary guidance is noncanonical, scratch-only, and annealed off before final clean-rollout continuation.

diagnostics.failure_decomposition_inputs: The same raw arrays support objective/gradient, visited-subspace, and learned-to-reference interpolation diagnostics without retraining.
diagnostics.standard_certificate_inputs: Raw K, nominal-clean rollout arrays, and Riccati-epsilon rollout arrays are retained for every interpolated row.

k_alpha_adamw_polish.scope: Basin-access diagnostic for the free output-feedback bridge: run adamw_then_lbfgsb from K_alpha = (1-alpha) K_scratch + alpha K_ref under the deterministic no-coverage clean-rollout objective and current whitened scaling.
